name: Yeon Studios
positioning: Category-defining infrastructure layer of a vertically integrated content and distribution ecosystem.
differentiator: Proprietary OTT and video infrastructure giving clients tighter control over distribution, audience data, and monetisation.

voice.description: Strategic, visionary, and infrastructure-led. Speaks in systems and scale, not hype.
characteristics: Speaks in systems and scale, not hype
Positions as the enabler behind the content revolution
Category-defining: introduces new language rather than borrowing competitors'

primary: Brand managers and marketing leads at mid-to-large companies
Agency heads and media buying leads
OTT platform operators and digital distributors
Event organizers in media and tech
Journalists and press covering media-tech and streaming
Potential IP collaborators and content partners
audience.language: English first. Bilingual only if a specific audience segment requires it.

content_pillars.name: OTT Infrastructure & Technology
content_pillars.description: Thought leadership on platform architecture, scalable video systems, distribution ecosystems

content_pillars.name: Industry Authority
content_pillars.description: Insights on streaming trends, monetisation models, the future of media-tech

content_pillars.name: Client Wins & Case Studies
content_pillars.description: How partners have scaled using Yeon Studios' infrastructure

content_pillars.name: Behind the Platform
content_pillars.description: How the technology is built and what problems it solves

approval.operational_owner: Kevin or assigned social media manager

success_metrics_3_month: 3–5 strategic OTT or content partnerships secured
10–20 qualified inbound leads (brands, platforms, IP collaborators)
